title: TestScenarios
description: Output contract for the design skill — an array of test scenarios ready for code generation.

id.description: Unique identifier for this test scenario

title.description: Human-readable title for the scenario (used as the test description)

acceptanceCriteriaIds.description: IDs of the acceptance criteria this scenario covers

tags.description: Playwright tags to annotate the test with (e.g. '@smoke', '@regression')

preconditions.description: Setup steps required before the scenario can run

description.description: Human-readable description of what this precondition sets up

factoryName.description: Name of the factory to call when setupMethod is 'factory'

apiEndpoint.description: API endpoint to call when setupMethod is 'api'

steps.description: Ordered list of actions the test will perform

action.description: Description of the action to perform (e.g. 'click the submit button')

selector.description: Playwright selector for the target element

networkIntercept.description: Network request to intercept or assert during this step

method.description: HTTP method of the request to intercept

url.description: URL pattern of the request to intercept

expectedResults.description: Assertions to verify after the steps complete

assertion.description: Human-readable description of what to assert

selector.description: Playwright selector for the element to assert against

value.description: Expected value to assert (text content, attribute value, etc.)
